note: SECONDARY reference, not the protocol result. Section 7 specifies gzip, so the protocol numbers in the sibling <label>.json files are gzip (config.maxEncoding=gzip) and are the ones that set C2. These brotli figures are measured identically (same harness, cold cache, CDP encodedDataLength, weight-runs=3) but with --max-encoding br, i.e. what Chrome actually negotiates against a real static host, since dotnet publish emits .br siblings and Chrome always sends br. Recorded so the C2 50x target is chosen against a known basis rather than an assumed one. Timings in the source files were run at --runs 1 and are NOT protocol-valid; only the weight was taken from them.
